name: threadatlas
description: Fully local conversation intelligence for your ChatGPT and Claude exports. Search, cluster, and query your AI chat history without any outbound network requests.
long_description:
ThreadAtlas turns your exported AI chats into a searchable, trustworthy local knowledge base. Import ChatGPT and Claude exports, review and approve conversations through an explicit privacy workflow, then let Claude query the approved corpus via MCP.

Key capabilities:
- Search conversations, chunks, projects, entities, decisions, and open loops
- Thematic clustering with deterministic TF-IDF + k-means
- Privacy-first: only explicitly approved (indexed) conversations are visible to Claude
- Hard delete physically removes all traces
- Optional local LLM integration for summaries and group naming

All data stays on your machine. No cloud APIs, no outbound connections.

vault_directory.title: Vault Directory
vault_directory.description: Path to your ThreadAtlas vault. Create one first with: threadatlas init <path>

tools.name: query
tools.description: Structured hybrid search across all indexed material with filter prefixes

tools.name: search_conversations
tools.description: Hybrid keyword + semantic search over indexed conversations

tools.name: search_chunks
tools.description: Keyword search over chunks of indexed conversations

tools.name: get_conversation_summary
tools.description: Get LLM-generated summary and metadata for one indexed conversation

tools.name: get_conversation_messages
tools.description: Get messages for one indexed conversation

tools.name: get_conversation_chunks
tools.description: Get chunks for one indexed conversation

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List active projects derived from indexed material

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get a project page with linked conversations, decisions, open loops, and entities

tools.name: get_project_timeline
tools.description: Timeline of conversations linked to a project

tools.name: list_open_loops
tools.description: List currently open loops across indexed material

tools.name: list_entities
tools.description: List recurring entities with type disambiguation across indexed material

tools.name: list_groups
tools.description: List thematic conversation groups with visible member counts

tools.name: get_group
tools.description: Show one group with its indexed members

tools.name: generate_profile
tools.description: Generate a narrative profile of the indexed user organized by topic

tools.name: find_related
tools.description: Find past conversations most relevant to a given context description

tools.name: inspect_conversation_storage
tools.description: Metadata-only audit of what is stored for a conversation
